blocks.text: Corrugated Trays & Inserts Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group
High-Precision Corrugated Trays & Inserts for Protective Packaging
Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam manufactures corrugated trays, partitions, dividers, and custom inserts designed to secure products during transport and improve packing efficiency.
Our die-cut inserts are engineered from E, B, and BE flute board, delivering the perfect balance of strength, cushioning, and lightweight performance.
Ideal for electronics, food & beverage, cosmetics, household goods, fragile items, and any product requiring separate compartments or reinforced internal structure.
We make both standalone trays and inserts for shipping cartons — fully customizable for product fit and protection.
Why Choose Our Corrugated Trays & Protective Inserts?

Our Vietnam plant specializes in precision die-cut engineering, ensuring every tray or insert fits perfectly inside your carton.By controlling corrugation, printing, die-cutting, and gluing in-house, we ensure maximum consistency and lower lead times for global export clients.
• Perfect fit for product & carton size
Perfect fit for product & carton size
• Ideal for e-commerce, retail & industrial use
Ideal for e-commerce, retail & industrial use

blocks.text: Corrugated Tray & Insert Types We Produce
Flat or folded trays for organizing multiple products inside a master carton.
Vertical inserts that create multiple compartments — perfect for bottles, cans, cosmetics, and glassware.
Engineered shapes that protect fragile items from shock & vibration.
Used in retail and shelf-ready packaging (SRP).
Ideal for fresh products, snacks, beverages, bakery packaging (B-flute or E-flute).
Used to stabilize products in cartons or on pallets.
Corrugated Board Options for Trays & Inserts
We manufacture trays and inserts using:
• B-Flute: more strength for heavier items
B-Flute: more strength for heavier items
• BE Double Wall: extra shock absorption
BE Double Wall: extra shock absorption
• White Top / Kraft Liners: for food & retail display trays
White Top / Kraft Liners: for food & retail display trays
All materials are produced in-house for consistent quality.
